audit_items.proof_trace: free(subopts_orig) at L5539 is indeed bypassed by 14+ return 1 statements on error paths inside the sub-option parsing loop (L5427-L5535). However, all bypassing paths are return statements from main(), meaning the process exits immediately; the OS unconditionally reclaims all heap memory on process termination, so no persistent leak occurs. This is a memory hygiene issue visible to static analyzers but not a security vulnerability.
